product_overview: GenMark is an AI-powered generative marketing platform that enables users to produce, preview, and manage marketing visuals from natural-language prompts. The app provides secure account access and a dashboard for generating and reviewing assets.
core_goals: Allow users to securely register and authenticate to access a personalized dashboard.
Provide Text-to-Image generation that transforms natural-language prompts into marketing visuals.
Enable users to review and manage past generations via a history interface.
Offer simple profile and account management for user settings and preferences.
Surface clear success and error states for long-running generation tasks to improve usability.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Secure login and signup flows to grant users access to the GenMark dashboard and protected tools.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email address -> Fill password -> Submit login form -> See dashboard at /dashboard
Navigate to /signup -> Fill registration details -> Submit signup form -> See onboarding or dashboard at /dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill email address -> Fill password -> Submit login form -> See authentication error message (invalid credentials or missing account)

features.name: Text to Image Generation
features.description: Generate marketing visuals from text prompts with selectable generation settings and immediate preview of results.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/image -> Enter text prompt -> Select generation settings -> Submit generate request -> See generated image result in preview -> Save generated image to history
Navigate to /dashboard/image -> Enter text prompt -> Select generation settings -> Submit generate request -> See validation error if prompt is empty or malformed
Navigate to /dashboard/image -> Enter text prompt -> Select generation settings -> Submit generate request -> See generation failure message if server or processing error occurs

features.name: Generation History
features.description: List and review previously generated assets with previews and access to download or re-run generations.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/history -> See list of past generations -> Select a generation entry -> See generation details and preview -> Download or export the asset
Navigate to /dashboard/history -> See empty history state -> Navigate to /dashboard/image to create a new generation
Navigate to /dashboard/history -> Select a generation entry -> See not-found or missing-asset message if associated file is unavailable

features.name: Profile & Account Management
features.description: View and update user profile information and account preferences from the dashboard profile area.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/profile -> Update profile fields -> Submit profile update -> See confirmation that changes were saved
Navigate to /dashboard/profile -> Enter invalid profile data -> Submit profile update -> See validation error messages indicating required corrections

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Secure login and signup for GenMark users.

features.name: Text to Image Generation
features.description: Generate marketing visuals from text prompts.
